examples: While local gulls will dive voraciously for such handouts, the tern flies on.
All I can say for myself is that I read voraciously and draw fairly well.
The term entered into IT-speak only a year ago and has spread voraciously.
When not writing, he was reading voraciously or playing the flute to professional standard.
Studying philosophy at the University of Chicago, and reading voraciously from Plato to Kant to H.
